certificate.moduleName: Oracle Linux 8 Unbreakable Enterprise Kernel (UEK7) Cryptographic Module and Oracle Linux 9 Unbreakable Enterprise Kernel (UEK7) Cryptographic Module
certificate.caveat: Interim validation. When operated in Approved mode. When installed, initialized and configured as specified in section 11 of the Security Policy.
certificate.description: Oracle Linux 8 Unbreakable Enterprise Kernel (UEK7) Cryptographic Module and Oracle Linux 9 Unbreakable Enterprise Kernel (UEK7) API provides a C language API for use by other (kernel space and user space) processes that require cryptographic functionality

securityPolicy.title: Oracle Linux 8 Unbreakable Enterprise Kernel (UEK7) Cryptographic

sections.title: How this Security Policy was prepared

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: UEK7 CPU Time Jitter RNG Entropy Source (Cert. #E61)
AES GCM external IV encryption
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Encrypt a plaintext using AES GCM with an external IV

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Key derivation
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Derive a key from a key-derivation key or a shared secret

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Password-based key derivation
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Derive a key from a password

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: RSA encryption primitive
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Compute the raw RSA encryption of a plaintext/ciphertext

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: RSA decryption primitive
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Compute the raw RSA decryption of a plaintext/ciphertext

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: RSA signature generation (pre- hashed message)
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Generate a digital signature for a pre-hashed message
sensitiveSecurityParameters.securityFunction: RSA with PKCS#1 v1.5 padding (pre-hashed message)

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: RSA signature verification (pre- hashed message)
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Verify a digital signature for a pre-hashed message

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Key encapsulation
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Encapsulate a secret key using RSA with PKCS#1 v1.5 padding

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Key decapsulation
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Decapsulate a secret key using RSA with PKCS#1 v1.5 padding

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: RAM
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Temporary storage for SSPs used by the module as part of service execution

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: AES key
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: AES key used for encryption, decryption, and computing MAC tags
sensitiveSecurityParameters.use: Encryption Decryption Authenticated encryption Authenticated decryption Message authentication

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: HMAC key
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: HMAC key

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Shared secret
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Shared secret generated by (EC) Diffie- Hellman
sensitiveSecurityParameters.establishment: SP 800-56Ar3 (DH and ECDH shared secret computation)

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Entropy input
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Entropy input used to seed the DRBGs. Compliant with IG D.L.

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: DRBG seed
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: DRBG seed derived from entropy input. Compliant with IG D.L.
sensitiveSecurityParameters.strength: CTR_DRBG: 128, 192, 256 bits Hash_DRBG: 128, 256 bits HMAC_DRBG: 128, 256 bits
sensitiveSecurityParameters.generation: Derived from the entropy input as defined in SP800- 90Arev1

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: DRBG internal state (V, Key)
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Internal state of CTR_DRBG and HMAC_DRBG instances. Compliant with IG D.L.
sensitiveSecurityParameters.generation: Derived from DRBG seed as defined in SP800- 90Arev1

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: DRBG internal state (V, C)
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Internal state of Hash_DRBG instances. Compliant with IG D.L.

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Intermediate Key Generation Value
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Temporary value generated during Key Pair Generation services
sensitiveSecurityParameters.strength: ffdhe2048, ffdhe3072, ffdhe4096, ffdhe6144, ffdhe8192, P- 256, P-384 (112- 200 bits)

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: DH public key
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Public key used for Diffie- Hellman
sensitiveSecurityParameters.strength: ffdhe2048, ffdhe3072, ffdhe4096, ffdhe6144, ffdhe8192 (112- 200 bits)
sensitiveSecurityParameters.generation: SP 800-56Ar3 (safe primes) Section 5.6.1.1.4 Testing Candidates random values used are generated by SP 8000-90ADRBG
sensitiveSecurityParameters.use: Shared secret computation Key pair generation

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: DH private key
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Private key used for Diffie- Hellman

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: EC public key
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Public key used for EC Diffie- Hellman
sensitiveSecurityParameters.generation: FIPS 186-4 Appendix B.4.2 Testing Candidates random values used are generated by SP
sensitiveSecurityParameters.use: Shared secret computation Key pair generation

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: EC private key
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Private key used for EC Diffie- Hellman
sensitiveSecurityParameters.use: Shared secret computation Key pair generation

services.name: Non-approved mode
services.description: Automatically entered whenever a non- approved service is requested
services.indicator: Equivalent to the indicator of the requested service

services.name: Safe primes key pair generation
services.properties: Key type: Diffie-Hellman key pair Groups: ffdhe2048, ffdhe3072, ffdhe4096, ffdhe6144, ffdhe8192 Security strength: 112-200 bits Method: SP 800-56Ar3 (safe primes) Section 5.6.1.1.4 Testing Candidates Compliant to SP 800-133r2, Section 5.2

services.name: EC key pair generation
services.properties: Key type: EC key pair Curves: P-256, P-384 Security strength: 128, 192 bits Method: FIPS 186-4 Appendix B.4.2 Testing Candidates Compliant to SP 800-133r2, Section 5.2

services.name: Diffie-Hellman
services.properties: Groups: ffdhe2048, ffdhe3072, ffdhe4096, ffdhe6144, ffdhe8192 Security strength: 112-200 bits Compliant with Scenario 2 (1) of FIPS 140-3 IG D.F

services.name: EC Diffie-Hellman
services.properties: Curves: P-256, P-384 Security strength: 128, 192 bits Compliant with Scenario 2 (1) of FIPS 140-3 IG D.F

services.name: AES GCM
services.properties: IV generated internally Security strength: 128, 192, or 256 bits SP 800-38F
IV provided externally Security strength: 128, 192, or 256 bits SP 800-38F
services.name: Key unwrapping
AES CBC or CTR with HMAC SHA-1, HMAC SHA- 256, HMAC SHA-384, or HMAC SHA-512
Encryption
services.approvedFunctions: AES ECB, CBC, CBC- CS3, OFB, CFB128, CTR, XTS

services.name: Authenticated encryption
services.cspsAccessed: AES key: W, E HMAC key: W, E
services.approvedFunctions: AES CCM, GCM (internal IV) AES CBC or CTR with HMAC SHA-1, HMAC SHA-256, HMAC SHA- 384, or HMAC SHA- 512
services.indicator: For all modes except AES GCM: crypto_aead_setk ey returns 0 For AES GCM: crypto_aead_get_ flags(tfm) has the CRYPTO_TFM_FIP S_COMPLIANCE flag set

services.name: Authenticated decryption
services.approvedFunctions: AES CCM, GCM (external IV) AES CBC or CTR with HMAC SHA-1, HMAC SHA-256, HMAC SHA- 384, or HMAC SHA- 512
HMAC SHA-1, HMAC SHA-224, HMAC SHA- 256, HMAC SHA-384, HMAC SHA-512, HMAC SHA3-224, HMAC SHA3-256, HMAC SHA3-384, HMAC SHA3-512
services.name: HMAC key, message
Signature verification primitive
services.approvedFunctions: ECDSA signature verification primitive with P-256 and P-384

services.name: Shared secret computation
services.cspsAccessed: DH private key: W, E DH public key: W, E
services.input: DH private key, DH public key

services.cspsAccessed: EC private key: W, E EC public key: W, E Shared secret: G, R
services.input: EC private key, EC public key
services.name: EC private key, EC public key
Key pair generation
services.cspsAccessed: DH private key: G, R DH public key: G, R Intermediate key generation value: G, Z
services.indicator: crypto_kpp_set_s ecret and crypto_kpp_gener ate_public_key return 0
services.output: DH private key, DH public key

services.cspsAccessed: EC private key: G, R EC public key: G, R Intermediate key generation value: G, Z
services.output: EC private key, EC public key
services.name: Curve
Random number generation
services.cspsAccessed: Entropy input: W, E DRBG seed: E, G DRBG internal state: E, G

services.name: Compression
services.description: Compress data (deflate, lz4, lz4hc, lzo, zlib-deflate, zstd)

services.name: Generic system call
services.description: Use the kernel to perform various non-cryptographic operations

services.name: Show version
services.description: Return the module name and version information

services.name: Self-test
services.description: Perform the CASTs and integrity tests
services.approvedFunctions: SHA SHA-3 AES HMAC KAS-FFC-SSC KAS-ECC-SSC CTR_DRBG Hash_DRBG HMAC_DRBG RSA See Table 23 for specifics

services.name: Error State
services.description: The Linux kernel immediately stops executing

portsAndInterfaces.physicalPort: As a software-only module, the module does not have physical ports. Physical Ports are interpreted to be the physical ports of the hardware platform on which it runs.
portsAndInterfaces.dataThatPasses: API data input parameters, AF_ALG type sockets
portsAndInterfaces.name: As a software-only module, the module does not have physical ports. Physical Ports are interpreted to be the physical ports of the hardware platform on which it runs.

portsAndInterfaces.dataThatPasses: API output parameters, AF_ALG type sockets
portsAndInterfaces.name: Data Output

portsAndInterfaces.dataThatPasses: API function calls, API control input parameters, AF_ALG type sockets, kernel command line
portsAndInterfaces.name: Control Input

portsAndInterfaces.dataThatPasses: API return values, AF_ALG type sockets, kernel logs
portsAndInterfaces.name: Status Output
